critiques.finding: Header login/signup buttons on Index lack parent wrapper data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHWbE (actions group under ai_RNbBKLUc).

critiques.finding: shell/Header.tsx does not surface ai_RNbBHWbF/bG when logged out; popups are wired only on Index.tsx inline header.
critiques.alternative: Acceptable for index-only entry in this item; document that logged-out Header reuse is Index-specific until a shared marketing shell lands.
